# Frontend Documentation Instructions

Use this file for work that writes or updates `docs/frontend/`.

## Source of truth

- `client/src/app/`
- `client/src/pages/`
- `client/src/components/`
- `client/src/hooks/`
- `client/src/providers/`
- `client/src/context/`
- `client/src/styles/`

## Cover

- user-visible routes and pages
- layout behavior and navigation
- UI state and interactions
- auth-related frontend behavior
- responsive/mobile behavior

## Do not confuse with

- backend implementation details
- raw API contracts
- operations or deployment procedures
